commands.review_summary:
The PR narrows/removes timeout-sensitive Codex dynamic-tool tests, widens one MCP `tools/list` timing test, and raises undici from 8.3.0 to 8.5.0 across root/plugin manifests and locks.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests -170, Config 0, Other 0. Total -170 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a PR to stabilize timeout-sensitive tests and update a dependency floor, not a user bug report. I verified the changed tests map to current Codex registered-tool and MCP catalog-timeout source invariants, but did not run the timing flakes locally.

target.title: refactor(policy): split doctor modules
target.body:
## Summary
- Split policy doctor metadata, strictness comparison, and shared value readers out of `register.ts`.
- Move policy-area health-check factories under `doctor/scopes/`, with scope-owned findings helpers where applicable.
- Keep `register.ts` as the evaluation/orchestration module and preserve existing public re-exports for callers/tests.

## Context
- Follow-up to openclaw/openclaw#89596 after it merged.
- Rebased onto upstream `main` at `44500daaa059be57fae08908206e342da3d2c2cd`.
- Draft while the scope layout is being settled.
- Structural only: no config schema/options, CLI flags, plugin API/contract, env vars, migrations, policy behavior, or runtime filtering changes.

## Structure

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  register["register.ts\nevaluation + orchestration"]
  checks["checks.ts\ncheck factory aggregator"]
  metadata["metadata.ts\ncheck IDs + rule metadata"]
  strictness["strictness.ts\npolicy strictness comparisons"]
  utils["utils.ts\nshared value readers"]

  register --> checks
  register --> metadata
  register --> strictness
  register --> utils
  checks --> scopes

  subgraph scopes["doctor/scopes/ - policy-owned modules"]
    core["core.ts\npolicy file/hash/attestation"]
    channels["channels.ts\nchannels + ingress"]
    gateway["gateway.ts\ngateway checks + findings"]
    modelNetwork["model-network.ts\nMCP + models + network"]
    tools["tools.ts\nagents/tools + TOOLS.md"]
    sandbox["sandbox.ts\nsandbox posture"]
    dataAuth["data-auth.ts\ndata/secrets/auth profiles"]
    execApprovals["exec-approvals.ts\nexec approvals evidence"]
  end
```

Review model: open `register.ts` for the policy evaluation flow, `checks.ts` for registration order, and `doctor/scopes/<area>.ts` for the checks and findings owned by one policy area.

## Scope Layout
- `metadata.ts`: check IDs, rule metadata, and sandbox container rule metadata.
- `strictness.ts`: policy strictness comparisons.
- `utils.ts`: shared policy value readers/path helpers.
- `checks.ts`: small check factory aggregator and dependency type.
- `scopes/core.ts`: policy file, hash, attestation, and parse checks.
- `scopes/channels.ts`: channel provider and ingress checks.
- `scopes/gateway.ts`: gateway checks and gateway exposure findings.
- `scopes/model-network.ts`: MCP server, model provider, and network checks/findings.
- `scopes/tools.ts`: agent/tool posture and TOOLS.md metadata checks.
- `scopes/sandbox.ts`: sandbox mode/backend/container/browser checks.
- `scopes/data-auth.ts`: data handling, secrets, and auth profile checks.
- `scopes/exec-approvals.ts`: exec approvals artifact/posture checks.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed:
The policy doctor refactor should preserve existing policy evaluation, health-check registration, check IDs/order, and public metadata exports while moving code into scope-owned modules.

Real environment tested:
WSL Ubuntu 24.04 root checkout at `/root/src/openclaw-89596-review`, source harness on PR head `8311a855fcbe2bf330ac6fa4101b89c8e1437cc2` rebased onto upstream `main` `44500daaa059be57fae08908206e342da3d2c2cd`. GitHub Actions also ran on the same head.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
1. `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
2. `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/metadata.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/strictness.test.ts --reporter=dot`
3. `node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/checks.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/utils.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/metadata.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/strictness.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/channels.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/core.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/data-auth.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/exec-approvals.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/gateway.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/model-network.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/sandbox.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/tools.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/metadata.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/strictness.test.ts`
4. `node_modules/oxlint/bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/checks.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/utils.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/metadata.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/strictness.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/channels.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/core.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/data-auth.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/exec-approvals.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/gateway.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/model-network.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/sandbox.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/tools.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/metadata.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/strictness.test.ts`
5. `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD && git diff --check`
6. `codex review -c model="gpt-5.5" --base origin/main`
7. `gh pr view 94314 --repo openclaw/openclaw --json isDraft,headRefOid,mergeStateStatus,statusCheckRollup`

Evidence after fix:
- Local Vitest output: `Test Files 3 passed (3)`, `Tests 277 passed (277)`.
- Local format/lint output: `All matched files use the correct format.` and `Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.`
- Extension typecheck completed successfully via `pnpm tsgo:extensions`.
- Codex review on the current diff reported: `No actionable correctness issues were found in the policy doctor refactor.`
- Live GitHub PR snapshot for head `8311a855fcbe2bf330ac6fa4101b89c8e1437cc2`: draft, merge state `CLEAN`, 0 pending checks, 0 failed checks.

Observed result after fix:
The policy doctor focused test suite passes on the refactored module layout, extension typecheck/lint/format/diff checks are clean, Codex found no actionable correctness issue, and GitHub reports the PR head clean with all checks complete.

What was not tested:
No packaged/live OpenClaw runtime lane was run because this PR is structural-only and does not change policy behavior, config surface, plugin API, CLI surface, env vars, or migrations.

## Validation
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/metadata.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/strictness.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/checks.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/utils.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/metadata.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/strictness.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/channels.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/core.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/data-auth.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/exec-approvals.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/gateway.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/model-network.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/sandbox.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/tools.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/metadata.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/strictness.test.ts`
- `node_modules/oxlint/bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/checks.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/utils.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/metadata.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/strictness.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/channels.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/core.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/data-auth.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/exec-approvals.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/gateway.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/model-network.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/sandbox.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/tools.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/metadata.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/strictness.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD && git diff --check`

## Size Notes
- `register.ts`: 5,580 LOC after split
- Check/finding scope modules:
  - `checks.ts`: 46 LOC
  - `scopes/*.ts`: 1,261 LOC total
  - largest scope files: `gateway.ts` 333 LOC, `model-network.ts` 232 LOC, `tools.ts` 191 LOC
- Other new modules:
  - `metadata.ts`: 543 LOC
  - `strictness.ts`: 270 LOC
  - `utils.ts`: 63 LOC
- Companion tests:
  - `metadata.test.ts`: 161 LOC
  - `strictness.test.ts`: 44 LOC
